name: Apple-Cinnamon Swirl Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in 1-1/4 cups warm water (115-120°F). Add egg, cake mix, and salt; beat until smooth.
2. Stir in enough flour by hand to make a soft dough. Knead on floured surface until smooth (dough will be sticky).
3. Place in greased bowl; turn once. Cover, let rise until doubled in bulk, 1-1/4 hours.
4. Punch down dough. Divide in half. Cover, let rest 10 minutes.
5. Mix apples, sugar, pecans, and cinnamon.
6. Roll one half of dough to a 12x8-inch rectangle. Brush surface with some butter; sprinkle with half the apple mixture.
7. Starting at a short end, roll as for a jelly roll. Seal sides and ends. Place in greased 8-1/2x4-1/2x2-1/2 inches loaf pan.
8. Brush top with more butter; sprinkle with remaining apple mixture. Repeat with remaining dough.
9. Cover, let rise until doubled (1 hour).
10. Bake at 375°F for 30-35 minutes. Remove from pans; cool.
Confectioner's Icing:
1. Blend enough light cream into 1 cup sifted confectioner's sugar to make a spreading consistency.
2. Blend in vanilla and salt.
